approaches_tried.insight: Only works when G(neg(delta)) in M' (inl case), not when F(delta) in M' (inr case)

approaches_tried.result: works when M' sees V and V sees M
approaches_tried.insight: Derives M' sees M, contradicting h_not_R'. Only works when M' sees the witness.

approaches_tried.result: requires h_indep: F(delta) not derivable from GContent(M')

new_infrastructure.strict_escape_seed_consistent: Seed is consistent when F(psi) independent of GContent(M')
new_infrastructure.reflexive_seriality_escape_via_seed: Full escape construction using above lemmas
